---
title: "Piras, Davide, Dr."
description: "Software Engineer"
image: Portrait_Placeholder.png
categories: [staff, all]
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  links:
    #see a list of available icons here: https://icons.getbootstrap.com/
    - icon: envelope-at
      text: Email
      href: mailto:dpiras@ethz.ch 
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/
    - icon: github
      text: homepage
      href: "#" 
---
Add Description
